name: small accounting teams processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting teams processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We automatically convert raw bank transaction data into formatted bookkeeping entries instead of manual bookkeeping processes.
problem_solved: manual data entry and formatting of bank transactions

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual data entry and formatting of bank transactions
